Metadata.title: Nemanzh Software Studio | Enterprise .NET and Full-Stack Development
Metadata.description: Nemanzh Software Studio is my independent software practice focused on enterprise applications, scalable .NET backends, cloud solutions, and modern web platforms.

hero.availability: Open to selected enterprise projects and long-term technical partnerships.
hero.title: .NET-led enterprise software for teams that need stable delivery and clean systems.
hero.lead: I build enterprise applications, scalable .NET backends, and cloud-connected web platforms for teams that need dependable execution.
hero.body: Nemanzh Software Studio is how I present my work: senior delivery across insurance software, public sector systems, internal business platforms, and modern web products, with a focus on maintainable systems and direct communication.

stats.label: years across enterprise and product systems

about.title: An independent software studio built around senior enterprise delivery.
about.intro: I am not trying to look larger than I am. The value is direct senior execution, strong backend engineering, and systems that stay understandable after release.
paragraphs: I build enterprise applications and internal business platforms for teams that need solid architecture, reliable delivery, and backend engineering that does not collapse under day-to-day business use.

My background spans Nordic insurance software, public sector systems, identity and integration-heavy enterprise environments, and payment-enabled web products. That range helps me move between product work, operational constraints, and long-term maintenance without unnecessary complexity.

I am strongest when .NET is at the core and the rest of the stack needs to work with it cleanly: Next.js or Angular frontends, SQL-heavy systems, cloud services, integrations, upgrades, and production ownership.

highlights.label: Focus
highlights.value: Enterprise applications, backend engineering, cloud solutions

highlights.label: Approach
highlights.value: Clear ownership, measured delivery, maintainable systems

highlights.label: Fit
highlights.value: Insurance, SaaS, internal platforms, modernization work

services.title: Enterprise application development with .NET in the foreground.
services.intro: My services center on fullstack development, scalable systems, cloud solutions, and backend engineering that support real business operations.

items.title: Enterprise Application Development
items.description: Business-critical web applications built around clear architecture, dependable delivery, and maintainable code paths.

items.title: .NET Backend Engineering
items.description: C#, ASP.NET, APIs, and core business logic designed for reliability, change, and steady system growth.

items.title: Cloud and Multi-Tenant Solutions
items.description: Cloud-ready architecture, tenant-aware systems, caching, secrets management, and deployment workflows across Azure and AWS.

items.title: System Integrations and Identity
items.description: Payments, federated login, identity lifecycle automation, and message-driven synchronization between business systems.

items.title: Modernization and Upgrades
items.description: Incremental upgrades across .NET, Angular, databases, and legacy enterprise systems without risky rewrites.

items.title: Internal Tools and Automation
items.description: Operational software, reporting flows, and automation that reduce repetitive work and improve visibility.

experience.title: Experience presented as actual roles, with enterprise delivery in the foreground.
experience.intro: The pattern across these roles is consistent: backend responsibility, modernization work, integrations, and business software that has to stay stable while it evolves.

items.summary: Building web applications with Node.js, Strapi, Next.js, PostgreSQL, and AWS services, with payments, identity, and event-driven integrations in production.
items.impact: I shipped Stripe and crypto wallet flows, Web3Auth onboarding, Cardano key generation and encryption, CIP-68 badge functionality, AWS SQS synchronization, Cognito-based federated login, and Docker Compose delivery on AWS and Qovery.

items.summary: Worked on insurance software used across the Nordic market, with .NET, Angular, SQL Server, and cloud-oriented multi-tenant delivery.
items.impact: I delivered invoicing and notification flows, helped move the stack from .NET 4.8 to 8 and Angular 8 to 16, optimized T-SQL, and strengthened operations with Azure Redis Cache, Azure Key Vault, and Azure DevOps deployment automation.

items.summary: Worked on identity, integration, and modernization tasks across enterprise and public-sector systems built on Microsoft technologies.
items.impact: I implemented Microsoft Identity Manager across Azure Active Directory and on-prem Active Directory, optimized C#/.NET integrations for Navision and Primavera, and extended SharePoint-based workflows with React, Power BI, and Power Automate.

items.summary: Built and maintained REST APIs and backend modules for public-sector platforms including the National Employment Service and dual education systems.
items.impact: I built and maintained ASP.NET services for national institutions, improved authorization flows, added code generators, and expanded an in-house framework with stored-procedure-driven database work in SQL Server.

projects.title: Selected platforms and client projects.
projects.intro: A few recognizable systems and organizations I have worked on, shown as straightforward project cards.

items.title: National Employment Service
items.description: Backend work for a public-sector platform with REST APIs, authorization logic, and SQL Server-backed business workflows.
items.impact: The focus was reliability, structured domain logic, and maintainable delivery inside an in-house ASP.NET framework.

items.title: Dual Education
items.description: Backend support for the Serbian dual education platform, covering API logic, data workflows, and public-sector delivery constraints.
items.impact: The work centered on stable backend behavior, clear data handling, and software that could support administrative processes without unnecessary complexity.

items.title: Unionen
items.description: Enterprise platform work delivered through Insicon for the Swedish market, with .NET, Angular, SQL Server, and long-lived business workflows.
items.impact: The emphasis was on maintainability, feature delivery, and modernization inside a production system rather than one-off implementation work.

items.title: ICA Forsakring
items.description: Insurance platform work in the Swedish market, spanning enterprise application delivery, backend changes, frontend work, and cloud-oriented modernization.
items.impact: I contributed across the stack in a production insurance environment where continuity, upgrades, and long-term maintainability mattered more than fast cosmetic change.

items.title: IntersectMBO
items.description: Work on a blockchain-oriented platform focused on product logic, backend services, and stable execution of key user and transaction flows.
items.impact: The emphasis was on transaction reliability, clearer product behavior, and a system that could support growing demand without losing operational stability.

items.title: Central Registry / One Stop Shop
items.description: Optimization of a web application for faster, more stable, and more accurate work with the central registry of live births and deceased persons.
items.impact: The work required data accuracy, reliable administrative flows, and careful handling of one of the country's most important state data sets.

credentials.title: Formal credentials and conference publications connected to practical engineering work.
credentials.intro: A Microsoft certification and two conference papers focused on testing, database modeling, and backend-oriented engineering practice.

items.title: Azure Fundamentals - AZ-900
items.description: Foundation certification covering Azure cloud concepts and core platform services.

items.title: Best Practices in Writing Unit Tests for the .NET Framework
items.description: Presented at the conference and published in the SYM-OP-IS Proceedings on September 23, 2021.

items.title: Transformation of the Database Logical Schema: From a Relational (T-SQL) Model to a Document-Oriented MongoDB
items.description: Presented at the conference and published in the proceedings on September 22, 2022.

stack.title: Technologies I use to build enterprise applications and scalable systems.
stack.intro: My strongest delivery work sits around the Microsoft stack, modern frontend frameworks, cloud infrastructure, and integration-heavy business platforms.

contact.title: Need an enterprise app, a backend rebuild, or modernization support?
contact.body: I work with teams building business platforms, upgrading legacy systems, and shipping cloud-connected products. If you need senior .NET and full-stack delivery with clear ownership, get in touch.
contact.closing: Clear scope, senior engineering ownership, and systems built to stay maintainable.
